Who We Are

About Mechatron Engineering

Mechatron Engineering was established in 2021 to provide construction services professionally, focusing on extending a level of competence and commitment for the satisfaction of clients in their entirety.

The company started its initial construction project in the textile industry and is currently working with major clients in the same industry for construction & MEP. Mechatron is in the process of expanding services for construction & MEP activities in other major industrial, commercial and government sectors.

Mechatron Engineering has a team of highly qualified and experienced professionals in their respective fields, with an approach to deliver every project with good quality and on a committed time-frame.

Established2021
Our Mission

To understand our clients and deliver with uncompromised quality.

To understand the needs of our clients and provide exceptional services that ensure their satisfaction, by performing efficiently with uncompromised quality assurance and secure profitability for the company as well as for its clients.

Our vision is to be a leading services group capable of undertaking construction initiatives for local and international clientele, with a commitment to succeed by promoting teamwork and individual creativity.

Our Clients

Trusted by leading industrial and commercial names

What We Offer

Construction and MEP contracting, scoped as one job.

From foundation to finishing, and from wiring to commissioning — services performed by our own qualified team.

Building Construction

Non-residential, industrial, commercial and institutional building construction, including heavy mechanical construction.

Construction of Buildings

Utility & Pipeline Systems

Water and sewer line construction, oil and gas pipeline works, and highway, street and bridge construction.

Utility System Construction

MEP & Building Finishing

Electrical wiring, plumbing, heating and air-conditioning, elevator installation, drywall, painting and finishing works.

Building Equipment Contractors
